name: improve-execution-learnings
goal: Incorporate proven patterns from recent PRD executions (ai-config, reimagine-v2, multi-ide-support) into the execute-prd skill so future orchestrators benefit from institutional knowledge.

userStories.title: Pre-Flight Structure Verification
userStories.description: Verify SKILL.md structure matches plan assumptions before making any edits. Document current structure and confirm step numbers align with notes.md expectations.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm Step 2 = 'Read and Internalize the PRD' (Phase 0)
Confirm Step 6 = risk categories table (Phase 1)
Confirm Step 7 = mitigations section (Phase 1)
Confirm Step 10 = subagent prompt template (Phase 2)
Confirm Step 13 = reviewer code review dispatch (Phase 2)
Document current structure in progress.md
Read LEARNINGS.md to confirm table format

userStories.title: Add High-Impact Improvements to SKILL.md
userStories.description: Add phantom task detection (sub-bullets under Step 2) and grumpy reviewer mindset (paragraph in Reviewer role section). These are the two highest-impact patterns from learnings.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 2 has sub-bullets for phantom task detection: check file existence, check functionality, verify PRD currency
Phantom detection guidance focuses on VERIFICATION mindset, not just ls -la
Phantom detection cites: 'reimagine-v2 PRD (2026-03-07) — 5/6 phantom tasks, ~80% work saved'
Reviewer role section has 'Mindset' paragraph with 'grumpy senior engineer' persona
Mindset includes adversarial questions: 'What if this already exists?', 'What about legacy data?'
Mindset cites: reimagine-v2 PRD
Lines added: <30

userStories.title: Add Medium-Impact Improvements to SKILL.md
userStories.description: Add DRY constant extraction (Step 10), backwards compatibility check (Step 13), build scripts risk (Step 6), and shared utility mitigation (Step 7).
acceptanceCriteria: Step 10 Reuse & Design has bullet: 'Extract constants for repeated structures...' citing ai-config PRD
Step 13 reviewer prompt includes backwards compat guidance for data-writing code, citing reimagine-v2
Step 6 risk table has row: 'Build Scripts | Do referenced scripts exist? | Verify before putting in prompts'
Step 7 has 'Shared Utility Mitigation' section after Documentation Impact
Lines added: <30

userStories.title: Update LEARNINGS.md with New Patterns and Metrics
userStories.description: Add three new proven patterns (phantom detection, backwards compat, constant extraction) and update metrics table with ai-config and reimagine-v2 entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Pattern 4 added: 'Phantom task detection before execution' with evidence
Pattern 5 added: 'Backwards compatibility for data-writing code' with evidence
Pattern 6 added: 'Extract constants for repeated structures' with evidence
Metrics table has ai-config row: 5/5, 100%, 3 iterations, +75 tests, 8/8 mitigated
Metrics table has reimagine-v2 row: 1/6*, 100%, 1 iteration, n/a, 9/9 mitigated
Table format matches existing columns and alignment
